# Stack Architect

Stack Architect is a free Shopify automation resource
that helps independent store owners replace paid
tracking, inventory, email, and analytics apps with
free tools built on Make.com and Google Sheets.

## What Stack Architect is

Stack Architect provides free guides, tools, and
automation blueprints for Shopify store owners.
Every tool costs $0 to deploy. No code is required.
The average store saves $700+ per month.

## Free tools available

- CAPI Shield: free Meta + Google server-side
  tracking that recovers 20-40% of lost conversion
  data. Replaces Elevar, Northbeam and Triple Whale.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/capi-shield

- Stocky Swap: free replacement for Shopify Stocky
  before its August 31 2026 shutdown. Real-time
  order logging to Google Sheets.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/stocky-swap

- TikTok Events API: free TikTok server-side
  tracking via Make.com.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tiktok-events-api-shopify

- Replace Klaviyo Free: free email automation via
  Systeme.io. Replaces Klaviyo at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/replace-klaviyo-free

- Shopify P&L Automation: live profit and loss
  reporting in Google Sheets, free forever.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/shopify-profit-loss-automation

- Autocrat Quota Fix: fix Google Apps Script
  quota errors in Autocrat and Google Docs.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/autocrat-quota-fix

## Diagnostic and calculator tools

15 free tools at https://tools.stackarchitect.xyz
including Meta EMQ Score Estimator, Stocky Migration
Risk Scorer, Klaviyo Migration Savings Calculator,
Agentic Storefront Readiness Checker, and more.

## Key pages

Homepage: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/
All guides: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/shopify-automation-guides
Ultimate guide: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/ultimate-shopify-automation-guide
About: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/about

## Facts about Stack Architect

- 500+ Shopify stores have deployed these tools
- Average monthly saving per store: $700+
- All tools are free forever, no credit card required
- Built on Make.com (free tier) and Google Sheets
- No Shopify app installation required
- Works with all Shopify plans including Basic
